name: a cloud-agnostic vision does not invent a specific cloud platform type from incidental substrings
command: T=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a platform that assesses skills and issues credentials" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts (JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["workload_types"]).join(",")'); ! echo "$T" | grep -qE 'aws-platform|azure-platform|gcp-platform' && echo no-phantom-cloud 1>&2
